---
title: "Solo fido key on Ubuntu 20.04"
date: 2020-04-23
forum: Hardware
---

### Post by ian-leedham on 2020-04-23
Hi all,
I have just upgraded to 20.04 and am having an issue which I am hoping you can help me with.
On 18 i had to add the udev rule for my solo key using:
```

git clone https://github.com/solokeys/solo.git
cd solo/udev
make setup

```
as in structed on [https://docs.solokeys.io/solo/udev/](https://docs.solokeys.io/solo/udev/)

Since upgrading it doesn't seem to be working using that rule or the one included in the chromium file:
```

# This file is automatically generated.
# camera
KERNEL=="vchiq", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# camera
KERNEL=="video[0-9]*", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# joystick
KERNEL=="event[0-9]*", SUBSYSTEM=="input", ENV{ID_INPUT_JOYSTICK}=="1", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# joystick
KERNEL=="full", SUBSYSTEM=="mem", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# joystick
KERNEL=="js[0-9]*", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# opengl
KERNEL=="nvhost-*", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# opengl
KERNEL=="nvmap", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# opengl
KERNEL=="renderD[0-9]*", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# opengl
KERNEL=="tegra_dc_[0-9]*", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# opengl
KERNEL=="tegra_dc_ctrl", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# opengl
KERNEL=="vchiq", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# opengl
SUBSYSTEM=="drm", KERNEL=="card[0-9]*", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# u2f-devices
# Bluink Key
SUBSYSTEM=="hidraw", KERNEL=="hidraw*", ATTRS{idVendor}=="2abe", ATTRS{idProduct}=="1002", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# u2f-devices
# Feitian ePass FIDO, BioPass FIDO2
SUBSYSTEM=="hidraw", KERNEL=="hidraw*", ATTRS{idVendor}=="096e", ATTRS{idProduct}=="0850|0852|0853|0854|0856|0858|085a|085b|085d", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# u2f-devices
# Google Titan U2F
SUBSYSTEM=="hidraw", KERNEL=="hidraw*", ATTRS{idVendor}=="18d1", ATTRS{idProduct}=="5026", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# u2f-devices
# Happlink (formerly Plug-Up) Security KEY
SUBSYSTEM=="hidraw", KERNEL=="hidraw*", ATTRS{idVendor}=="2581", ATTRS{idProduct}=="f1d0", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# u2f-devices
# HyperSecu HyperFIDO
SUBSYSTEM=="hidraw", KERNEL=="hidraw*", ATTRS{idVendor}=="096e|2ccf", ATTRS{idProduct}=="0880", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# u2f-devices
# JaCarta U2F
SUBSYSTEM=="hidraw", KERNEL=="hidraw*", ATTRS{idVendor}=="24dc", ATTRS{idProduct}=="0101", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# u2f-devices
# Neowave Keydo and Keydo AES
SUBSYSTEM=="hidraw", KERNEL=="hidraw*", ATTRS{idVendor}=="1e0d", ATTRS{idProduct}=="f1d0|f1ae", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# u2f-devices
# Nitrokey FIDO U2F
SUBSYSTEM=="hidraw", KERNEL=="hidraw*", ATTRS{idVendor}=="20a0", ATTRS{idProduct}=="4287", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# u2f-devices
# OnlyKey
SUBSYSTEM=="hidraw", KERNEL=="hidraw*", ATTRS{idVendor}=="1d50", ATTRS{idProduct}=="60fc", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# u2f-devices
# SoloKeys
SUBSYSTEM=="hidraw", KERNEL=="hidraw*", ATTRS{idVendor}=="1209", ATTRS{idProduct}=="5070|50b0", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# u2f-devices
# Thetis Key
SUBSYSTEM=="hidraw", KERNEL=="hidraw*", ATTRS{idVendor}=="1ea8", ATTRS{idProduct}=="f025", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# u2f-devices
# Tomu board + chopstx U2F + SoloKeys
SUBSYSTEM=="hidraw", KERNEL=="hidraw*", ATTRS{idVendor}=="0483", ATTRS{idProduct}=="cdab|a2ca", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# u2f-devices
# U2F Zero
SUBSYSTEM=="hidraw", KERNEL=="hidraw*", ATTRS{idVendor}=="10c4", ATTRS{idProduct}=="8acf", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# u2f-devices
# VASCO SeccureClick
SUBSYSTEM=="hidraw", KERNEL=="hidraw*", ATTRS{idVendor}=="1a44", ATTRS{idProduct}=="00bb", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
# u2f-devices
# Yubico YubiKey
SUBSYSTEM=="hidraw", KERNEL=="hidraw*", ATTRS{idVendor}=="1050", ATTRS{idProduct}=="0113|0114|0115|0116|0120|0121|0200|0402|0403|0406|0407|0410", TAG+="snap_chromium_chromedriver"
``` 
